archetypes.name: CLI Command
archetypes.description: CLI command handlers and subcommand implementations.

analysisHints.description: CLI command modules handle user-facing terminal commands

archetypes.name: Component
archetypes.description: React/UI component files with JSX-returning functions.

analysisHints.description: Components have inflated call counts from hooks, state setters, and JSX rendering
High fan-in expected — config modules are widely imported

archetypes.name: Entry Point
archetypes.description: Module entry points, public APIs, and CLI entry files where uncalled exports are expected.

analysisHints.description: Uncalled exports are expected in entry points

archetypes.name: Gateway
archetypes.description: Re-export-heavy gateway modules that concentrate cross-package imports.

analysisHints.description: Gateway modules are expected to re-export heavily

archetypes.name: Hook
archetypes.description: React hooks — custom hooks encapsulating reusable stateful logic.

analysisHints.description: React hooks follow the use* naming convention

archetypes.name: Model
archetypes.description: Data models, schemas, and ORM definitions.

archetypes.name: Page
archetypes.description: Page-level components, views, or screens — top-level UI entry points for routes.

analysisHints.description: Page/view components orchestrate many sub-components and have inflated call counts

archetypes.name: Route Handler
archetypes.description: Server-side HTTP route handlers (Express, Hono, Koa, etc.).

archetypes.name: Route Module
archetypes.description: Framework convention route modules (Remix/React Router) with loader/action/default exports.

analysisHints.description: Convention exports are expected in route modules

archetypes.name: Schema
archetypes.description: Runtime validation schemas and data shape definitions (Zod, Yup, Joi, etc.).

analysisHints.description: Schema modules define runtime data shapes for validation

archetypes.name: Service
archetypes.description: Service layer modules — API clients, data fetching, and business logic orchestration.

analysisHints.description: Service modules orchestrate business logic and external calls

archetypes.name: Store
archetypes.description: State management stores and slices where high fan-in is expected.

analysisHints.description: High fan-in is expected for state management modules

archetypes.name: Types & Constants
archetypes.description: Type definitions, constants, and enums — companion files, not logic.

analysisHints.description: Unidirectional coupling and high fan-in expected for type files

archetypes.name: Utility
archetypes.description: Shared utility, helper, and infrastructure modules where high fan-in is expected.

analysisHints.description: High fan-in is expected for utility modules

Single pure hashing utility function extracted to break circular dependencies — shared infrastructure with no business logic.
Generates and emits per-zone output files (context.md + summary.json) — orchestrates business logic for producing analysis artifacts.
Core Louvain-based zone detection analyzer — main business logic orchestration for architectural zone analysis.
Pure helper module providing formatted help text for CLI commands — no I/O, no state, consumed by CLI command handlers.
Creates and configures the MCP server with all tools/resources registered — service layer wiring for the MCP protocol endpoint.
CLI command stub that delegates 'sourcevision serve' to the web package by spawning it.
Business logic service that generates PDF reports from analysis data — pure data transformation with no HTTP/CLI concerns.
Pure business logic for generating PR markdown documents from branch work records — all functions are pure with no I/O or side effects.
Shared utility functions for merging/chunking inventory and imports data — high fan-in infrastructure helpers.
Single path normalization utility — minimal shared infrastructure helper.
Canonical sorting utilities for deterministic JSON output — pure functions, high fan-in across the codebase.
Build script configuring esbuild pipelines for viewer and landing page — build tooling configuration, not runtime code.
Dev server orchestration script that spawns tsc watcher, esbuild watcher, and server — build/dev tooling configuration.
Client-side landing page entry point with DOM interaction logic — browser-executed module entry point, not a component.
Caching service with filesystem-based invalidation and LRU eviction — stateful business logic class managing aggregation results.
Stateful metrics collection service tracking concurrent process counts and memory utilization in ring buffers.
Explicit gateway module that concentrates all web→sourcevision runtime imports into a single re-export file per CLAUDE.md gateway pattern.
Stateful incremental aggregation service for per-task token usage with filesystem change detection.
Deprecated gateway that re-exports from both rex-gateway and domain-gateway — pure re-export module aggregating cross-package imports.
Port availability detection and dynamic allocation utilities — shared infrastructure helpers with no business domain logic.
Pure utility functions for classifying and building PR markdown refresh failure diagnostics — no I/O, no state, high reuse.
Stateful per-process memory tracking service with ring buffer samples, trend detection, and leak reporting.
Explicit gateway module that concentrates all web→rex runtime imports into a single re-export file per CLAUDE.md gateway pattern.
Stateful inverted index service for PRD item search with lazy build, mtime-based invalidation, and relevance scoring.
Server startup orchestrator — wires HTTP server, routes, WebSocket manager, file watchers, and shutdown handlers into a running server.
Periodic cleanup scheduler service that prunes orphaned usage records and emits WebSocket events.
WebSocket manager service implementing RFC 6455 framing, connection lifecycle, and broadcast — stateful server-side infrastructure.
Stateful WebSocket health metrics tracker accumulating connection lifecycle events, cleanup metrics, and broadcast statistics.
Pure constants file defining data file name mappings shared between server and viewer layers — no logic, only constant definitions.
Standalone IntersectionObserver-based DOM utility class with zero framework dependencies — shared infrastructure helper for viewport culling.
Request deduplication helper — shared infrastructure with likely high fan-in
Bootstraps/initializes the viewer application — classic entry point pattern

Business logic orchestration module that runs a multi-step PR validation pipeline (build + rex validate), with both a library API (runPRCheck) and a CLI entry point — primarily a service/orchestration module.
Utility module that computes and writes dashboard artifact metadata for sourcevision output files; pure helper with no CLI entry point.

Server lifecycle orchestration service — manages start/stop/status of the web server process, PID files, port resolution, and background/foreground modes.
